calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2018 Continued To Aug-21-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appeareance. Self represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to AUG-21-2018 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. The court intends to dismiss the case pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) if plaintiff does not appear at the next hearing. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Dec-12-2017 Text Ruling

No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT HENSLEY EVENT RESOURCES' MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS as to all causes of action alleged in the complaint filed by Jennifer Toy is granted. No opposition filed. Written order is signed and filed in open court.
